title: cyclosorus griffithianus
intro: Cyclosorus griffithianus, also known as Griffith's fern or Griffith's spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus griffithianus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help treat various respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or powder for consumption, with some herbalists also recommending it as a topical application for skin irritations.
